adjudication_basis: AUTO unique-first-def (non-circular): each label is a class-0 role whose normalized first-def signature is unique in BOTH compiles -- a source-grounded struct access / named symbol / immediate that identifies it independent of ig number and of the matcher use-site feature. Cross-file pair (mndiagram2.c), distinct from the mnvibration corpus. Generic first-defs left unadjudicated.
raw_ig_note: Of 11 auto-labels raw ig_idx agrees on 0; 11 drifted and must be recovered by first-def identity.

use_site_stress_notes.68: mr r#,r# <- subf r#,r#,r# <- li r#,0

use_site_stress_basis: Use-site-stress labels: GENERIC first-def roles (mr/add/lbz/rlwinm/subf) that DRIFTED, adjudicated by source-grounded composite def-lineage (the chain of defining ops to a unique anchor such as lwz +44 / a named symbol) -- this lineage is the role PRODUCERS, independent of the matcher use_site (consumers) feature, so it is non-circular. Each listed role is recovered by the matcher WITH use_site but NOT when use_site is ablated, proving use_site is load-bearing. The method reproduces mnVibration hand-labels 41->44 and 42->45.
